title: Scissors 3 Pack, 8'' All Purpose Scissor with Ultra Sharp 2.5mm Thick Blades, Soft Grip Handle, Heavy Duty Scissors for School Office Craft Home, Right/Left Handed
features: [Durable and Sharp Blades]: The blades of scissors are made of high-density steel that makes 3 times harder than normal stainless steel. This allows our scissors to stay sharp beyond 100,000 cuts.

[Heavy-Duty Scissors]: The metal scissor has high performance when cutting through fabric, boxes, plastic packages, burlap, paper and light line. It is smooth and efficient in a variety of usage scenarios due to premium steel.
[Comfortable Grip]: Soft-grip touch points offer a comfort hold and great control. Fit right and left handed users.
[Multipurpose Scissors]: Suitable for Handcraft Workshop, middle school, office, mail room, craft room, great for most regular household tasks.
